basic_details.job_title: Govt HSS Uparbahal Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Govt. Higher Secondary School, Uparbahal (Govt HSS Uparbahal) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Guest Faculties Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 12-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG with minimum 50% marks in the respective subject. B.Ed degree and PGDCA will be given weightage.
qualification.details: Guest Faculties: PG with minimum 50% marks in the respective subject (English, Odia, Political science, History, Economics, Odia(optional)). Retired Govt. / Non-Govt. Aided Lecturers below 65 years of age / fresh candidates are eligible.

salary_details.details: Salary: Rs. 400 per class, maximum 50 classes per month.

selection_process: Application submission Weightage for B.Ed degree and PGDCA
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Govt HSS Uparbahal Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: balangir.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
